base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of golem_stone_variants — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Golem — massive stone guardian. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Golem — massive stone guardian; 3 palette variants (orange/yellow/gray); blocks entry to Cantlin town unless defeated with Fairy Flute to put to sleep
